# 355 Main — Sovereign Intelligence, Anchored in Armonk (Full Content)

> Three executive Sovereign Shells on the North Castle Ventures campus at 355 & 357 Main Street, Armonk, New York. This file contains a page-by-page content summary of https://355main.com for AI assistants and LLM crawlers. A shorter overview lives at https://355main.com/llms.txt

## Site Overview

355 Main offers three executive **Sovereign Shells** — Class A commercial real estate fused with on-premises, deterministic AI and outfitted with Vitra furniture. Each shell is held for a single institution. The buildings sit on the North Castle Ventures campus in Armonk, NY (Westchester County), roughly 40 miles north of New York City. The site's operator is North Castle Ventures. Pricing is private and is never published; inquiries are handled personally.

---

## Page: Home (https://355main.com/)

**Title:** 355 Main | Sovereign Intelligence, Anchored in Armonk

The homepage introduces the offering: three executive Sovereign Shells at 355 & 357 Main Street, Armonk, New York. Class A commercial space fused with on-premises, deterministic AI, outfitted with Vitra. Each shell is held for a single institution — sovereignty of space and sovereignty of compute, together.

Core claims:
- Regulated legal and financial institutions cannot send sensitive data to public model APIs.
- The answer is on-premises, deterministic AI co-located with the people who use it — compute, counsel, and capital in one room.
- Alpha School is the standing proof point: it leased the entire second floor, the space has been delivered, and Alpha School opens in fall 2026 with its AI-powered "2 Hour Learning" model.
- Location: Armonk, NY — coordinates 41.1265° N, 73.7140° W. Manhattan proximity without the commute.

## Page: The Shells (https://355main.com/shells)

**Title:** The Shells – Three Sovereign Shells | 355 Main

Three shells, one standard of sovereignty. Each pairs Class A space with on-premises compute and Vitra FF&E, held for a single institution.

A Sovereign Shell is a physical containment zone for enterprise AI: Class A commercial real estate fused with STC-55 acoustic isolation, dedicated E-Line fiber, and on-premises deterministic compute. The building and the silicon operate as a single instrument.

- **Shell A — The Executive Node.** Floor 1, Suite A. 814 USF / 1,065 RSF. Available. Engineered for a principal-led practice that runs lean and highly secure — Class A space fused with a localized NVIDIA hardware vault. STC-55 shielding, dedicated air-gapped fiber, Vitra Executive FF&E. No data leaves the room.
- **Shell B — The Operations Node.** Floor 1, Suite B. 888 USF / 1,162 RSF. Available. The largest of the three shells — built for a small institution operating at full multi-agent stride. Open working desks, private counsel space, and high-density on-premises compute in one continuous, sovereign environment. STC-55 shielding, dedicated air-gapped fiber, Vitra Operations FF&E.
- **Shell C — The Orchestration Node.** Floor 1, Suite C. 810 USF / 1,060 RSF. Held; not available. Trucast.AI holds Suite C as its integration headquarters, running sovereign intelligence exactly as designed — the physical model of the thesis, in active occupancy.

Building occupancy context: Northwell Health holds the Floor 1 rear suite (2,440 USF / 3,193 RSF), validating the compliance and privacy parameters of the campus; Alpha School has leased all of Floor 2 (5,800 USF / 7,590 RSF) — delivered, opening fall 2026. Shells A and B are the last available ground in a fully operational, highly regulated building. Pricing is private.

## Page: The Thesis (https://355main.com/thesis)

**Title:** The Thesis – Sovereign Intelligence | 355 Main

The argument for on-premises, deterministic AI: regulated legal and financial institutions cannot send their most sensitive data to public model APIs. The answer is on-premises, deterministic AI co-located with the people who use it — compute, counsel, and capital in one room.

Guiding principles:
- **Determinism over probability** — reliable, auditable systems for regulated work.
- **Premises over cloud** — data and models stay on-site.
- **Institution over crowd** — one institution per shell, not shared coworking.

Proof points: Alpha School leased the entire second floor of 355 Main (Floor 2, 5,800 USF / 7,590 RSF) — now delivered, opening fall 2026 with its AI-powered "2 Hour Learning" model. The thesis is not a projection; it operates inside the building. Trucast.AI holds Shell C as its integration headquarters and runs the model daily.

## Page: The Campus (https://355main.com/about)

**Title:** The Campus – Armonk, New York | 355 Main

355 & 357 Main Street, Armonk, NY — Class A buildings on the North Castle Ventures campus, outfitted with Vitra for sovereign work. Total building: 10,752 USF / 14,070 RSF. Coordinates: 41.1265° N, 73.7140° W.

The build (FF&E partners):
- **Vitra** — premium furniture enabling dynamic space reconfiguration (Soft Work, Joyn 2, Tyde 2, and more — a 30-item product catalog is shown on the page).
- **BASO Lighting** — round architectural fixtures above dynamic spaces.
- **Louis Poulsen** — Danish architectural lighting design.
- **Coronet** — linear office fixtures for ambient illumination.
- **Marset** — Soho pendants and mono points for accent and task lighting.
- **Casambi** — wireless lighting controls and scene management.

## Page: Inquiry (https://355main.com/inquiry)

**Title:** Inquiry – Request for Comment | 355 Main

Inquiries are structured as a Request for Comment (RFC), reviewed personally by North Castle Ventures. The form captures name, company, role, team size, and preferences. Response within 1–2 business days. Tours can be booked via HubSpot Meetings.

- **North Castle Ventures** (operator) — https://northcastleventures.com
- **The RFC** — https://ainativeoffice.org
- **Nate** — https://nativeagentic.com
- **Trucast** — https://trucast.ai
